# DEBASS meta-classifier — pinned dependencies
# Install into a virtualenv on SCC:
#   python3 -m venv ~/debass_meta_env
#   source ~/debass_meta_env/bin/activate
#   pip install -r env/requirements.txt

# Broker clients (alerce >=2.1 for LSST survey param; requires Python >=3.10)
alerce>=2.1.0,<3
fink-client>=7.0
lasair>=0.1.0,<1
pittgoogle-client>=0.3        # Pitt-Google Broker (BigQuery); needs GCP credentials
antares-client>=1.14          # NOIRLab ANTARES — ORACLE + Superphot+ tags
requests>=2.31

# Data / IO
pandas>=2.0
pyarrow>=15.0
numpy>=1.26

# ML
scikit-learn>=1.4
lightgbm>=4.0
scipy>=1.12

# Positional crossmatch (TNS bulk CSV cone search)
astropy>=5.0

# Validation
pydantic>=2.0
jsonschema>=4.0

# CLI
rich>=13.0
python-dotenv>=1.0

# Local experts (install separately if GPU unavailable)
# supernnova>=2.0
# astro-parsnip>=1.4.0

# Phase 1b local experts
sncosmo>=2.10                 # SALT3 template fit (χ² Ia consistency expert)
iminuit>=2.20                 # required by sncosmo.fit_lc default minimizer
light-curve>=0.8              # Rust-fast Bazin/Villar parametric features

# ORACLE local expert (dev-ved30/Oracle, PyTorch).  Weights live at
#   artifacts/local_experts/oracle/models/ELAsTiCC-lite/revived-star-159/
# and are pulled from the upstream repo (NOT bundled with pip):
#   curl -L -o best_model_f1.pth \
#     https://github.com/dev-ved30/Oracle/raw/main/models/ELAsTiCC-lite/revived-star-159/best_model_f1.pth
oracle @ git+https://github.com/dev-ved30/Oracle.git
torch>=2.0                    # CPU inference is fine on SCC
torchvision>=0.15

# Plots + paper figures
matplotlib>=3.7
seaborn>=0.13

# Dev / test
pytest>=8.0
pytest-cov
